pi_items.source: NinjaTrader 8 official documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/the_sim101_account.htm) - Sim101 is the default simulation account in NinjaTrader 8
No contradictions found. NinjaTrader allows users to set custom initial cash values (default is $100,000, but users can set to any amount including $50,000). The value is plausible for a task.
String formatting validation - '50,000' is the correct thousands-separated format for the numeric value 50000
NinjaTrader 8 Accounts Tab documentation (https://ninjatrader.com/support/helpguides/nt8/accounts_tab.htm) - Accounts tab grids can be exported to CSV format via right-click export menu
Verified through env.json (user account 'Docker') and task description which states 'My Documents' folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents)
env.json file in the environment directory confirms id field matches task.json env_id reference
Subjective assessment - no objective source to verify this claim
Configuration parameter - plausible timeout for a task requiring navigation, account editing, and CSV export operations (5 minutes)
Configuration parameter - plausible step count for UI navigation and CSV export operations
Reward type specification - task returns binary pass/fail based on successful CSV export with correct balance

privileged_info_summary: The task targets the Sim101 account in NinjaTrader 8, which is the default simulation trading account. The task requires resetting its Initial Cash balance to $50,000.00 (the default is $100,000). The Accounts tab grid can be exported to CSV format. The export should be saved as 'current_accounts.csv' in the Windows user's Documents folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents). The task has a 5-minute timeout and can be completed in up to 40 steps. The task environment is Windows 11 with NinjaTrader 8 installed.
